schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Users  Get

post.description: Create a new user (admin only)
Create a new company (admin only)

schema.title: Response List Companies Api V1 Companies  Get

post.description:
Create a new task (any type: incident, request, change, problem, etc.)

The system will:
- Auto-generate ticket number (e.g., INC000000001, REQ000000001)
- Calculate priority from urgency + impact
- Set initial status based on ticket type
- Auto-fill opened_by if not provided

get.description:
List tasks with filtering and pagination

**Filters:**
- sys_class_name: incident, request, change, problem, task, request_item
- status: varies by ticket type
- priority: low, medium, high, critical
- assigned_to_me: Show only tickets assigned to me directly
- assigned_to_my_groups: Show tickets assigned to my support groups
- search: Search in number, title, description

parameters.name: sys_class_name

schema.description: Filter by ticket type (incident, request, etc.)
schema.title: Sys Class Name

parameters.description: Filter by ticket type (incident, request, etc.)

schema.description: Show only tickets assigned to me
schema.title: Assigned To Me

parameters.description: Show only tickets assigned to me

parameters.name: assigned_to_my_groups

schema.description: Show tickets assigned to my support groups
schema.title: Assigned To My Groups

parameters.description: Show tickets assigned to my support groups

get.description: Get a specific task by ID

post.description: Assign a task to a user or group
Resolve a task
Close a task

Create a new incident

- **title**: Short description (5-255 chars)
- **description**: Detailed description
- **category**: Main category (required)
- **urgency**: low, medium, high, critical
- **impact**: low, medium, high, critical
- **priority**: Automatically calculated from urgency + impact

get.description:
List incidents with filtering and pagination

**Filters:**
- status: new, assigned, in_progress, pending, resolved, closed
- priority: low, medium, high, critical
- category: Any category name
- assigned_to_me: Show only tickets assigned to me directly
- assigned_to_my_groups: Show tickets assigned to my support groups
- assigned_to_id: Filter by assigned user
- assigned_group_id: Filter by assigned support group
- opened_by_id: Filter by who opened the ticket
- caller_id: Filter by caller
- affected_user_id: Filter by affected user
- company_id: Filter by specific company
- search: Search in title and description

parameters.name: assigned_to_me

schema.description: Show only tickets assigned to me
schema.title: Assigned To Me

parameters.description: Show only tickets assigned to me

parameters.name: assigned_to_my_groups

schema.description: Show tickets assigned to my support groups
schema.title: Assigned To My Groups

parameters.description: Show tickets assigned to my support groups

get.description: Get a single incident by ID

patch.description:
Update an incident

All fields are optional. Only provided fields will be updated.
Priority is automatically recalculated if urgency or impact changes.

delete.description:
Soft delete an incident (admin only)

Sets is_deleted flag to True instead of actually deleting the record

post.description:
Assign an incident to a user or group

Automatically changes status to 'assigned' if currently 'new'

Resolve an incident

Changes status to 'resolved' and records resolution details

Close an incident

Can only close resolved incidents. Changes status to 'closed'

Create a new service request

- **title**: Short description
- **description**: Detailed description
- **category**: Request category
- **urgency**: low, medium, high, critical
- **requires_approval**: Whether approval is needed

get.description:
List service requests with filtering and pagination

**Filters:**
- status: submitted, pending_approval, approved, in_progress, fulfilled, closed
- priority: low, medium, high, critical
- category: Any category name
- my_requests: Show only requests I created
- pending_approval: Show only requests awaiting approval (for approvers)
Get a single request by ID

post.description:
Approve a request (admin/manager only)

Changes status from pending_approval to approved
Reject a request (admin/manager only)
Assign a request to a user or group
Mark a request as fulfilled
Close a request (can only close fulfilled requests)
Create a new category (admin only)
Create a new support group (admin only)

delete.description: Soft delete a support group (admin only)

post.description: Add members to support group (admin only)

delete.description: Remove member from support group (admin only)

patch.description: Update member details in support group (e.g., set team lead) - Admin only

get.description: Get overview console - all tickets from user's support groups (using central tasks table)

get.description:
Get list of roles

Filter by module (incident, request, task, etc.) or level (read, read_create, agent, admin)

post.description:
Create new role

Requires admin privileges

patch.description:
Update role

System roles cannot be modified. Requires admin privileges.

delete.description:
Delete role (soft delete)

System roles cannot be deleted. Requires admin privileges.

post.description: Create new permission group (admin only)

delete.description: Delete permission group (soft delete, admin only)

post.description: Add members to permission group (admin only)

delete.description: Remove member from permission group (admin only)

post.description: Add roles to permission group (admin only)

delete.description: Remove role from permission group (admin only)
